name: branding-ux-skill
description: 'Use when crafting brand-led UX, editorial layouts, emotional design, elegant spacing, storytelling sections, and mobile-friendly presentation.'
---

# Branding and UX Skill

## Purpose
Create intentional, emotionally resonant product experiences.

## Use When
- Designing visual identity and landing pages
- Building calm, premium, or expressive UI
- Shaping layout, typography, motion, and storytelling
- Improving mobile usability and touch targets

## Design Rules
- Use consistent spacing and clear hierarchy
- Prefer editorial typography over generic defaults
- Use soft shadows and refined surfaces when appropriate
- Keep layouts clean and focused
- Add motion with purpose, not decoration
- Make the experience feel branded, not generic

## UX Rules
- Show clear feedback for loading and actions
- Keep navigation simple on mobile
- Use transitions to guide attention
- Make the user feel the product, not just use it

## Workflow
1. Define the emotional direction.
2. Choose spacing, type, and color tokens.
3. Build the layout with hierarchy in mind.
4. Add motion and feedback carefully.
5. Review mobile behavior and readability.
